title: Billings, MT — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Billings, MT: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Billings is a city in MT with a population of 117,116. Montana’s largest city with Yellowstone proximity, no sales tax, and Big Sky country.

Last updated: July 06, 2026
